findings.description: NVML reports 0pct memory util while 807MB loaded on both GPUs
FP32 compute peak 359W GPU0 337W GPU1 at 100pct utilization
VRAM grew 794MB during compute — CUDA allocates extra buffers
455MB stuck after empty_cache — NVML blind throughout
GPU0 22W higher than GPU1 during compute

conclusion: A100 VRAM workload FP32 complete. 455MB residual. NVML blind. Peak compute 359W.
